evals.name: bounded-context-discovery
evals.prompt: Split an order platform into bounded contexts based on catalog, checkout, payments, and fulfillment language.

evals.name: aggregate-design
evals.prompt: Define the aggregate boundary and invariant for an invoice approval workflow with line items and payment state.

evals.name: context-map
evals.prompt: Build a context map between ordering, pricing, and ERP, and mention whether an anti-corruption layer is needed.

evals.name: event-integration
evals.prompt: Define the event integration for shipment booked and invoice settled events across contexts.

evals.name: when-to-delegate-to-boot-or-persistence
evals.prompt: After that, decide whether a task about JPA locking and transaction annotations should stay in DDD or move to another skill.
